name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter, manual report compilation causes compliance issues. We automate report generation instead of manual report compilation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter
problem_solved: Timely generation of tax withholding reports
